developer_response.body:
If you have any constructive criticism for us that could help us create a better game we would really appreciate it.

If you are having any issues or doubts we can gladly help you out. Try joining our discord server https://discord.gg/nrx4ekjfDV

In the future, It'd be good to have a structured review to help us bring a good game to the community.

Hope we can hear from you.

reviews.review_title: Takes me back to my old vr days
reviews.review_description: I like the idea of a vr version of rocket league where you are a cat, but it reminds of old sky strikers where their were no supports just two teams and hitting a ball with a bat
Needs more players and can get boring but still pretty good

But one thing. Please can you make some way to get all season pass rewards? Like how fortnite used to do when the season ends you get the rewards you missed. Would love to get those spooky cosmetics i missed. But otherwise this is an AMAZING game, i love the gameplay and environment. Cant wait to see what you amazing developers add next!👍

I really like this game because I have 2 cats irl and really like cats, I'm interested in soccer too. If you are reading this and are wondering if you should download it or not, you should download it trust me

reviews.review_description: The movement is very inconsistent and sometimes when I try to jump, it just wont let me. Please fix the movement to be more smooth

I am NOT a sports fan, I dont like watching sports, i dont like playing sports, i dont like sports. But this game was actually super fun and cute, I really only downloaded this because we play as cats, but id really reccomend this for anyone who likes vr. Its fun, its chill, its cute, its just good. I have onlyone problem and that is how long it takes to join a round, like sometimes i can be in a server for a while because noone chooses what team to join.

I have deleted and re-downloaded this game multiple times and every time when I downloads and I entered it’s just a black screen that’s says Update the game to play but there is not update. Can anyone let me know what I need to do to get this working?

developer_response.body:
Hi there!

We just had an update in our game that fixes this endless update bug. Can you please update your game and see if you can play it properly now?
(also, if it's now fixed, consider changing this 1 star to a regular rating please 😉)

Consider joining our discord so we can help you quicker in cases like this
https://discord.gg/arvore-immersive-experiences-709830691424043038

reviews.review_title: I love it it's the greatest thing

developer_response.body:
Hi there!

We're glad to know you love our game! How about giving us 5 stars instead of 1 star then? Keep in mind we are a game in Early Access, so every good rating counts ;)

reviews.review_description: This game has an amazing concept with very good gameplay and long and good football or soccer matches. Although there are some drawbacks, like, if u sit down, you will have to restart your game as it glitches your hands, and the movement is a little buggy cause sometimes your hand gets trapped in the floor. But overall, this game is amazing with lots of potential for the future.

developer_response.body:
We're glad to see you loved our cats ❤️
Keep in mind we are still in early access so there are lots of improvements coming! :)

reviews.review_description: movement is weird but it’s good

Honestly this is a great idea I love the mechanics and the visuals but with every good game there is a bad thing which in this game is the community immediately after I joined this game I got into a server to play and they were screaming and cursing at me even tho I had just joined the game and even my own teammate dropped the f bomb on me 20 times in one sentence not good

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
Thanks for the feedback. We are glad to hear that you like the visuals and general aspects of our game :)

About the community, we are a game with a very young audience, so it's comprehensible they can get a bit loud most of the time. We see you and we hear you on that 😅
What I recommend you do is mute anyone that you find too inconvenient (which will get them just meowing instead of sending their mic input to you)

We are aware of the problems toxicity in the community can create, that's why we are working on a report-system ingame to help us all in that matter. It's to be implemented soon.

reviews.review_title: Want to be mod and have fun with people
reviews.review_description:
I love this game in its design, concept and gameplay. because this is a game about soccer which I played in irl. I feel like this will become a great game in the future. This game also gives rewards to free to play people which make this game not paid to win. The battlepass is easy to do and get more stuff. And for last I love to be a mod in this game do to how much work there putting on the game toodles.

-Sharkboivr

reviews.review_title: Can be fun and when it is it's amazing
reviews.review_description: It's a fun game but it's only fun when it's balanced if you have 2 cats you get a cardboard goalie but having 1 cat does nothing and its terrible when a teamate leaves making it a 3v2 or 3v1 else everything else is amazing 😺🐡 (I added and removed stuff after the dev response)

developer_response.body:
For now the cardboard goalie is activated when there's someone missing in regular 3v3 games. In different matches like 1v1 or 2v1 there's no goalie, 'cause people were asking a more challenging type of match.
When you join a room you can see how many people there are in there, so a tip is to join rooms of 5 or 3 to get in balanced matches.

Keep in mind that Clawball is still in early access and we are tweaking details as we go, so feedback from you all is important. Consider joining our discord to be in touch with the devs and other players and help us create a great game for you. When you join give the community manager a ping and he'll help you out with anything

https://discord.gg/arvore-immersive-experiences-709830691424043038

reviews.review_description: I think it’s fun I just want the tuna.

I’ve been bored recently on VR bit this game fixed that!!! The game is really fun with great movement and ball physics. And a great plus there is little to no toxic players! (That’s just my servers tho). I highly recommend this game to anybody who is thinking of buying it. My only complaint is the username is your meta username. So for me it’s my real name lol. It dose take away from the game and I really hope it can get more popular!
It’s super fun like rocket league but with G Tag movement

reviews.review_title: Help me how do you accept the terms 😭😭
reviews.review_description: Right now I hate it I can’t accept the terms of service and it makeing me go crazy pls help me accept or I will hate you.

developer_response.body:
Hey you!
You have to scroll down the terms til the end (using the thumbstick on your controller). When doing so the accept button in the bottom becomes clickable. Click it and there you go.

If you are having any issues doing it join our discord so we can help you there
https://discord.gg/arvore-immersive-experiences-709830691424043038

reviews.review_description: They bribe me XD

developer_response.body: It's more of an incentive for you to tell what you are thinking of the game. We're happy you've chosen to give us 5 stars tho 😻

Clawball is an incredibly fun and creative game with a charming cat-inspired theme! The vibrant visuals and physics-based gameplay are easy to pick up, yet offer plenty of depth. Add in great customization options and a welcoming community, and it’s a game that promises endless enjoyment!
